title: Freezing and unfreezing unicellular protists using Mr Frosty container
steps: Use growing medium according to your organism, in our case is marine broth. We usually make 10 mL final volume (1mL DMSO into 9mL growing medium).
Nalgene® Mr. Frosty® Cryo 1°C Freezing Containers
We usually keep it for 24 hours
When you see they start thawing take them out of the water bath, usually is after 2-3 minutes
We usually have 1mL frozen culture, transfer this 1 mL into 7 mL fresh growing medium flask
creator: Maria Rubio-Brotons
